meta.title: P2G Points – Play. Earn. Win. | Padel2Go
meta.description: The P2G Points system rewards you for every match, every booking and every activity. Level up, collect P2G Points and unlock exclusive rewards.

hero.description: Earn P2G Points for every match and redeem them for equipment, drinks at our vending machines or exclusive rewards. Your effort pays off!

howItWorks.subtitle: Just 4 steps to your first rewards.

items.title: Sign up
items.description: Download the P2G app and create your player profile.

items.title: Play
items.description: Book courts, play matches and join events.

items.title: Collect
items.description: Earn P2G Points for every activity and climb the levels.

items.title: Redeem
items.description: Trade your P2G Points for rewards and experiences.

earn.subtitle: Every match earns you P2G Points. The better you play, the more you earn!

redeem.subtitle: From equipment and vending machine to exclusive experiences.

tiers.subtitle: From Beginner to Padel Legend – every tier brings you new benefits, better discounts and more exclusive rewards. Your progress gets rewarded.
